prompt: I want to apply a design token colour as a background on a custom div that's not a hearth Box component, and also use a token value as padding in a React inline style on a third-party chart component. What's the correct way to access hearth tokens for each case?

assertions.text: Recommends hearth-tokens/browser for the inline style case
Recommends CSS variables for the custom div case
Does not recommend root hearth-tokens import for inline styles
Explains why the two approaches differ (CSS vs JS context)
